name: Snickerdoodles/Heritage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the sugar and butter until light.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Blend in the milk and vanilla.
4. Stir together the flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
5. Mix this dry ingredient mixture into the creamed mixture.
6. Blend in the chopped nuts.
7. Form the dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Place the balls about 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
9. Gently flatten each ball using the sugared bottom of a tumbler.
10. Bake at 375°F until done, for 10 to 12 minutes.
